title: bidens radiata
intro: Bidens radiata, also known as the hairy beggarticks or hairy beggar's lice, is a species of plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing fever and alleviating rheumatism. Herbal preparations of Bidens radiata often include infusions, decoctions, or topical applications, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
